name: SuperPawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn operator with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering collateral-based loans and retail merchandise sales.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc., headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas, is the dominant global pawn shop operator with over 3,300 retail locations spanning 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company serves cash and credit-constrained consumers who need quick access to funds without traditional credit requirements.

FirstCash's core business model centers on non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, allowing customers to borrow money against items of value. Beyond lending, the company operates a substantial retail merchandising business, buying and selling jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments, and general merchandise. FirstCash also offers layaway services (with 10% down payments), gold and precious metal buying, and operates AFF, a subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through 15,000+ merchant partner locations.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its scale—as a publicly traded company (component of S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indices), it operates significantly more locations than independent pawn shops and provides a standardized, nationwide experience. The company employs approximately 22,000 people and leverages technology-driven point-of-sale systems to streamline transactions. Their retail footprint means diverse inventory and immediate cash payment for items sold.

Pawn loans are inherently expensive compared to traditional credit, and customers must surrender possession of items during the loan term. While FirstCash doesn't disclose interest rates on their main website, pawn loans typically carry high rates (often 10-25% monthly in many states). For consumers without access to credit, however, pawn loans offer speed and no credit checks. The company is transparent about being non-recourse (collateral-based only), making it accessible to those with poor credit histories.
address: 4635 W Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89103

company_info.headquarters: 4635 W Flamingo Rd, Las Vegas, NV 89103

pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America—unmatched geographic accessibility
Fast cash on the spot with no credit checks or income verification required
Non-recourse loans mean no personal liability beyond loss of collateral
Diverse inventory and immediate cash payment when selling items to the company
Layaway service with affordable 10% down payment option for merchandise purchases
Buy gold, silver, and precious metals instantly for cash
Publicly traded company with established compliance and consumer protections
cons: Pawn loans carry significantly higher effective costs than traditional lending (typically 10-25% monthly rates depending on state)
Customers must surrender possession of pledged items for the loan duration, creating inconvenience
High default/redemption failure rates common in pawn industry—many customers lose collateral permanently
Limited transparency on the website regarding specific interest rates, terms, and redemption fees by location
Layaway service requires 10% down and ongoing payments, tying up cash for extended periods
best_for: Cash-constrained individuals needing immediate funds ($100-$5,000) without credit approval
People with poor credit or no credit history who cannot qualify for personal loans
Customers seeking to convert unused items (jewelry, electronics, tools) into quick cash
Shoppers looking for discounted merchandise through retail liquidation of pawned goods
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers facing genuine emergency cash needs who have items of value to pledge as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive—customers effectively pay 10-25% monthly rates and risk permanent loss of collateral if unable to repay, making this a last-resort option rather than sustainable credit management.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances)
Retail sales of new and previously pawned merchandise
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying and cash payment
Layaway purchase service with 10% down payment
Item evaluation and valuation for pawn purposes
Online store locator to find nearest location
Lease-to-own retail financing through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ partner merchants)
Buy and sell general merchandise (sports equipment, musical instruments, appliances)
